data.title: Add batch group approval protocol to onboarding SKILL.md (de10-d759 remediation)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
completion-verifier found DD1/DD2/DD3 fail: SKILL.md has 6 batch group headers (structural markers) but no agent-facing instructions governing how those headers control tool-use approval prompts.

## Implementation
Add a '## Batch Group Protocol' section near the top of SKILL.md (after the intro, before Phase 0) explaining:
1. At each '## Batch Group N: <name>' boundary, the executing agent must: (a) present the user with a single grouped approval prompt that names the group (e.g., 'Approve batch: dependency-install — this will run N commands'), (b) wait for approval before executing any commands in that group, (c) execute ALL commands in the group in a single Bash call after approval.
2. No tool-use approval requests are permitted between batch group boundaries (mid-group ad-hoc approvals are forbidden).
3. If a batch group's skip-guard condition is met, skip the entire group without presenting an approval prompt.
4. A 'Approve:' display string must accompany each group prompt: 'Approve: <group-name>'.

Also update each existing batch group header to include an inline note: 'Present: Approve: <group-name>'

## Acceptance Criteria
- SKILL.md contains a '## Batch Group Protocol' or equivalent section header with approval instructions
- grep -q 'Approve:' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- grep -q 'at most 6\|no more than 6\|batch group bound' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- test-onboarding-skill.sh continues to pass GREEN
- test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh continues to pass GREEN
